bugs.error_message: 'Label' is defined but never used. @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars
bugs.root_cause: Type dedup refactor imported extra shared types into main process that were not referenced.
bugs.fix: Removed unused type imports and cleaned extra newline in renderer types to satisfy lint/prettier.

bugs.error_message: TS2440: Import declaration conflicts with local declaration of 'DEFAULT_UI_SCALE'.
bugs.root_cause: Shared defaults refactor imported DEFAULT_UI_SCALE while old local constant remained.
bugs.fix: Removed local DEFAULT_UI_SCALE constant and kept shared import from src/shared/defaults.ts.

bugs.error_message: TS2322 in useAppStore persisted patch assignment: Type ... is not assignable to type 'undefined'.
bugs.root_cause: Indexed assignment to Partial<PersistedSlice> via union key was too narrow for TypeScript.
bugs.fix: Switched patch assignment to a generic record cast in the diff loop and revalidated build.

bugs.error_message: Null/undefined access in
bugs.root_cause: Property access on potentially null/undefined value
bugs.fix: Added null safety (optional chaining or null check)

bugs.error_message: Incorrect value in code
bugs.root_cause: Had "flex h-full flex-col overflow-hidden rounded-xl b
bugs.fix: Changed to `flex h-full flex-col overflow-hidden bg-app-title

bugs.error_message: Wykres po dodaniu kolejnych leków tylko się sumuje; peak jest zbyt ostry i spadek zbyt krótki.
bugs.root_cause: Generator wykresu sumował surowe krzywe dawek liniowo bez kształtowania odpowiedzi układu, więc kumulacja dawała ostre szczyty i zbyt szybki zjazd.
bugs.fix: Dodano smoothSummedEffect (asymetryczny filtr: szybszy wzrost, wolniejszy spadek) i przełączono slope/band/crash na krzywą wygładzoną.

bugs.error_message: Significant refactor of
bugs.root_cause: 4 lines replaced/restructured
bugs.fix: Rewrote 14→11 lines (4 removed)

bugs.error_message: Kanban task card height snaps to a fixed size during drag-and-drop instead of preserving each card's natural height.
bugs.root_cause: Drag overlay used a different preview shell than the sortable card and only preserved width, so overlay height was recalculated instead of matching the source card.
bugs.fix: Captured both width and height from the dragged element's initial rect and reused the exact same card shell classes in `KanbanCardPreview` as in `SortableCard`.

bugs.error_message: Dragging task into another kanban section shows no live drop preview and often inserts near the top instead of where the card is released.
bugs.root_cause: Board computed cross-column reorder only on drop, so target `SortableContext` never received temporary item positions during hover. Without live draft order, collision often resolved against early items and insertion index skewed toward the top.
bugs.fix: Added draft column task ids updated in `onDragOver`, rendered columns from that draft during drag, and computed insert-before/after using hovered card midpoint so cross-column preview and final drop position match pointer location.

bugs.error_message: Node test runtime failed to load `better-sqlite3` after Electron rebuild with NODE_MODULE_VERSION mismatch / module did not self-register.
bugs.root_cause: The native module was rebuilt for Electron's ABI during install, so direct database tests under the plain Node test runner could not load the binary.
bugs.fix: Reworked main storage tests to cover pure SQLite snapshot serialization/deserialization helpers instead of opening the native DB in the Node-based test script.

bugs.error_message: ESLint failed on `src/renderer/src/store/tests/register-aliases.cjs` with `@typescript-eslint/no-require-imports`.
bugs.root_cause: The CommonJS alias bootstrap file uses `require`, but the lint rule also scanned `.cjs` test helpers without a local override.
bugs.fix: Added a targeted ESLint disable comment for `@typescript-eslint/no-require-imports` at the top of the CommonJS helper and formatted the flagged files.

bugs.error_message: SQLite migration created a fresh database but did not import existing `electron-store` data, so existing users would boot into an empty workspace.
bugs.root_cause: The new storage backend initialized only `swag-todo.db` and removed the old dependency without any first-run bridge from the legacy `todoist-clone.json` payload.
bugs.fix: Added legacy-store parsing plus first-run import from the previous electron-store JSON file when creating a new SQLite database.

bugs.error_message: `store:savePartial` reloaded the full SQLite snapshot before every patch and `uiScale` lookup read the entire state just to fetch one setting.
bugs.root_cause: Main-process SQLite storage had no in-memory state cache, so partial updates and simple lookups paid a redundant full-database read cost before the inevitable full snapshot rewrite.
bugs.fix: Introduced a normalized in-memory cache, dedicated `loadUiScale()`, and prepared read/write closures so partial saves merge in memory and avoid unnecessary DB roundtrips.

bugs.error_message: Null/undefined access in
bugs.root_cause: Property access on potentially null/undefined value
bugs.fix: Added null safety (optional chaining or null check)

bugs.error_message: Type error
bugs.root_cause: Missing or incorrect type annotation
bugs.fix: Added type assertion/annotation

bugs.error_message: SQLite storage doing full DELETE+INSERT on every save — performance bottleneck
bugs.root_cause: writeSnapshotTx cleared all tables then re-inserted entire app state on every saveState/savePartial call
bugs.fix: Replaced writeSnapshotTx with writeDeltaTx: changedTaskIds() diffs prev/next snapshots, only changed tasks get UPSERT, child tables rebuilt per changed task_id, other collections use INSERT OR REPLACE + DELETE WHERE id NOT IN. writeSnapshotTx kept for legacy migration path only.

bugs.error_message: Significant refactor of
bugs.root_cause: 64 lines replaced/restructured
bugs.fix: Rewrote 68→3 lines (64 removed)

bugs.error_message: Missing guard clause
bugs.root_cause: No early return/throw for edge case: prevTaskJson.get(t.id
bugs.fix: Added guard clause: if (prevTaskJson.get(t.id)

bugs.error_message: Null/undefined access in
bugs.root_cause: Property access on potentially null/undefined value
bugs.fix: Added null safety (optional chaining or null check)

bugs.error_message: Type error
bugs.root_cause: Missing or incorrect type annotation
bugs.fix: Added type assertion/annotation

bugs.error_message: Performance: changedTaskIds used Array.find in O(n²) loop for deleted-task detection; writeState serialized cachedState on every save (1 extra full serialization); non-task collections upserted unconditionally on every writeDeltaTx call
bugs.root_cause: 1) Array.find inside for-loop = O(n²) for removed-task detection. 2) No snapshot cache — prev snapshot re-serialized from cachedState each write. 3) projects/sessions/labels/timeBlocks/medications always upserted even when unchanged
bugs.fix: 1) Built Set<string> from next.tasks before removed-task loop. 2) Added cachedSnapshot field, updated in writeState, used as prev in writeDeltaTx. 3) Added changedIds() helper, wrapped non-task collection upserts in if(changedIds(...)) guard

bugs.error_message: Performance: mergeAppState called normalizeAppState unconditionally — iterates all tasks on every savePartial even for non-task patches like isSidebarCollapsed
bugs.root_cause: normalizeAppState mapped all tasks through normalizeTask on every merge regardless of which fields changed
bugs.fix: Conditionally skip normalizeAppState when patch.tasks is undefined; only normalize when tasks field is present in the patch

bugs.error_message: Security: IPC store:save / store:savePartial accepted arrays without validating element IDs — malicious renderer payload could inject arbitrary id strings
bugs.root_cause: isAppState and isAppStatePatch only checked that fields were arrays, not that array elements had valid UUID-format ids
bugs.fix: Added UUID_RE + isSafeId + allHaveSafeIds helpers; isAppState and isAppStatePatch now reject payloads where any entity id fails UUID format check

bugs.error_message: Wrong operator: ?? should be !==
bugs.root_cause: Used "??" instead of "!=="
bugs.fix: Changed operator ?? → !==

bugs.error_message: Aplikacja od razu wywala się przy globalnym runtime error zamiast pokazać fallback i zostać otwarta.
bugs.root_cause: Brak globalnych handlerów dla `uncaughtException` / `unhandledRejection` w main oraz brak renderer boundary na poziomie root dla błędów React/window/promise.
bugs.fix: Dodałem globalne handlery procesu w Electron main z `dialog.showErrorBox` oraz renderer `GlobalErrorBoundary` łapiący React errors, `window.error` i `unhandledrejection`, z fallback UI i reloadem.

bugs.error_message: Global error boundary łapał też `window.error` z błędów ładowania assetów, więc pojedynczy font/img/script mógł zrzucić cały app do fallback screena.
bugs.root_cause: Handler `window.addEventListener('error')` traktował każdy `ErrorEvent` jak runtime JS error i nie odróżniał resource-load failures od błędów wykonywania kodu.
bugs.fix: Dodałem filtr `event.target !== window`, więc boundary ignoruje błędy ładowania zasobów i reaguje tylko na real runtime faults.

bugs.error_message: `bun run lint` dawał fałszywe prettier warningi przez przestarzały ESLint cache mimo że pliki były już sformatowane poprawnie.
bugs.root_cause: Skrypt lint używał `eslint --cache .`, a cache nie był spójny po `prettier --write`, więc workflow raportował nieistniejące problemy.
bugs.fix: Zmieniłem skrypt lint na `eslint .` bez cache, żeby wynik był deterministyczny i zgodny ze stanem plików.

bugs.error_message: Node test runtime zgłaszał `window is not defined` po włączeniu automatycznej hydracji Zustand store przy imporcie renderer store.
bugs.root_cause: Persist middleware auto-uruchamiał `rehydrate()` także w środowisku Node, gdzie `persistedStorage.getItem()` dotyka `window.api` i kończy się unhandled rejection.
bugs.fix: Dodałem `skipHydration: typeof window === 'undefined'` dla store domenowego i zostawiłem automatyczną hydrację tylko w rendererze przeglądarkowym.

bugs.error_message: openwolf designqc failed to capture mobile route: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED at http://localhost:5173/
bugs.root_cause: Dev server connection dropped during mobile screenshot capture, so only desktop screenshot completed.
bugs.fix: Reran designqc after theme tweak; desktop capture succeeded, mobile capture still needs a stable dev-server connection.
